app.betaNote: Initial scaffold with WebRTC and chunking foundations

radar.title: Find nearby devices
radar.subtitle: Share a room code, scan a QR code, or paste a peer ID to connect across platforms.
radar.placeholder: Enter room code or share link
radar.discoveryHint: True LAN discovery needs an additional rendezvous layer, so direct peer links are the reliable path in this build.

dropzone.title: Drop a file here
dropzone.subtitle: Chunked transfer is enabled for large files.
dropzone.hint: Desktop drag and drop, mobile file picker

transfer.maxFilesAlert: You can send up to 3 files at a time. Only the first 3 files have been queued.
transfer.memoryNote: Current receive flow reassembles chunks in memory. We can upgrade this to OPFS or IndexedDB streaming next.

mobile.peerLinkHint: The room UI is available, but direct peer links are the reliable option until relay discovery is added.

peer.emptyDetail: Use a peer link, QR code, or share link to open a direct connection.

qr.title: QR Connect
qr.helper: Open this QR code on another device or copy the share link to connect directly.

policy.title: Advertising and Privacy
policy.summary: Clear ad labeling, cookie notice, and privacy guidance.
policy.cookies: This site may use cookies or local storage for language preferences, transfer state, ad delivery, and ad measurement.
policy.labeling: Ads are labeled as advertisements and kept visually separate from transfer actions, navigation, and connection controls.
policy.consent: Google and its partners may serve personalized or non-personalized ads depending on your region and consent choices.
policy.safety: We do not ask visitors to click ads, and ad interaction should only happen from genuine user interest.

seo.title: DirectlyDrop: Secure Browser-Based File Transfer
seo.p1: DirectlyDrop uses WebRTC technology to establish a direct Peer-to-Peer connection between devices. Your files are never uploaded to a server or stored in a database. This ensures maximum privacy and transfer speeds limited only by your internet connection.
seo.p2: Thanks to end-to-end encryption, the photos, videos, or documents you send cannot be intercepted. Without the hassle of registrations, app downloads, or file size limits, you can start sharing in seconds using a secure 7-digit room code.
seo.step1Desc: Pair with the recipient using the 7-digit room code, QR code, or share link displayed on your screen.
seo.step2Desc: Once connected, choose the file you want to send. There are no file size limits or restrictions.
seo.step3Desc: Your selected file begins transferring instantly and securely directly between devices (P2P).
seo.faq1Q: Is there a file size limit?
seo.faq1A: No, because DirectlyDrop is completely serverless, there are no artificial file size limits. You are only limited by your browser's capacity and internet speed.
seo.faq2A: Nowhere! Data flows directly from your device to the recipient's device through an encrypted tunnel. Our cloud never stores your files.
seo.faq3A: Yes, it is completely free. We only show non-intrusive ads to keep the system running.

footer.description: Secure, fast, and serverless peer-to-peer file transfer tool.
